mapper.sql: id, name, gender, birthday, region, type, avatar, intro, tags, letter, status, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from artist where id = #{id} limit 1

select from artist where id in
#{id}
select from artist where status = 'enabled' order by update_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update artist set name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, region = #{region}, type = #{type}, avatar = #{avatar}, intro = #{intro}, tags = #{tags}, letter = #{letter}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
